message:
🐛 Add known deployment URLs to agent allowed origins

The security fix for Origin validation blocked Netlify and production
URLs from connecting to the local agent. Add them to the default
allowed origins list.

Users can still add custom origins via KKC_ALLOWED_ORIGINS env var.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
